case_title: HUANG, ZHI FEN VS. HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, ZHI FEN AS TO DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, ZHI FEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,375.10 PRINCIPAL, $16.13 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,616.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
